commands.review_summary:
This PR extracts Gateway protocol code into `packages/gateway-protocol` and Gateway client/runtime helpers into `packages/gateway-client`, while keeping `src/gateway/client.ts` as the OpenClaw wrapper and updating related build, docs, tests, and automation routing.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings by source inspection: current main accepts the full IPv6 link-local private range through `src/gateway/net.ts`, while the PR copy only accepts the `fe80:` spelling plus unrelated prefixes. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A focused repair can address the concrete source and automation blockers; maintainers still need to make the final package-boundary decision after the repair.
